particulars.description: All and whole the subjects known as and forming 5 william street, kirriemuir, DD8 4ED being the subjects delineated in red and marked "5" on the plan annexed and executed as relative to this disposition (the "plan") and being all and whole the subjects more particularly described in, and disponed by, disposition by miss margaret barrie and others with consents as thereinmentioned, in favour of james mcdonald, miller, meikle mill, kirriemuir and mrs mary ann barrie or mcdonald dated twenty third, twenty fifth and twenty eighth days of january and fourth day of february and recorded in the division of the general registers of sasines applicable to the county of forfar (now angus) on ninth day of june all in the year nineteen hundred and two under exception of the subjects described in the disposition by mrs catherine mary mills in favour of walter duncan and recorded in the land register of scotland under title number ANG11902 together with (1) a heritable and irredeemable servitude right of pedestrian access to and from the path lying generally to the north west of 4 william street, kirriemuir over the access path tinted yellow on the plan (ii) the whole other rights, common mutual and sole efferring to the said subjects, (iii) the whole heritable fittings and fixtures therein and thereon, (iv) the whole parts privileges and pertinents thereof and (v) the seller's whole right, title and interest present and future and therein thereto.

persons_entitled.name: Vida Bank Limited Trading as Vida Homeloans
